zh.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh.Westmill, Hertford, Eng: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.Duxford, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾度福德
zh.Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾阿申維爾
zh.lifeSummary: John Duxford於大約1510年出生在英國坎布利其爾度福德。他於1532年與Lady Agnes Durd在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾。

zh-hans.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh-hans.Westmill, Hertford, Eng: 英国英格兰賀特福爾維斯特米爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Duxford于大约1510年出生在英国坎布利其爾度福德。他于1532年与Lady Agnes Durd在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Duxford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Huxford in King's Nympton (Devon), from the Old English personal name Hōc (genitive Hōces) or Old English hōc ‘hook, angle, bend in a river’ (genitive hōces) + ford.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: John Duxford was born about 1510, in Duxford, Cambridgeshire, England. He married Lady Agnes Durd in 1532, in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1557, in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Duxford est né environ 1510, à Duxford, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Durd en 1532, à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1557, à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Duxford wurde um 1510 in Duxford, Cambridgeshire, England geboren. Er hat 1532 in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England Lady Agnes Durd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1557 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Duxford è nato il circa 1510 nel Duxford, Cambridgeshire, England. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Durd nel 1532, nel Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルス
ja.Westmill, Hertford, Eng: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミル
ja.Duxford, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアダクスフォード
ja.Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエル
ja.lifeSummary: John Duxfordは約1510年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアダクスフォードで生まれた。1532年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルでLady Agnes Durdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルで48歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Duxford(은)는 대략 1510년 영국 캄브리지실르 드스퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 1532년 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에서 Lady Agnes Durd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에 묻혔다.

mn.Westmill, Hertford, Eng: Westmill, Heorotfordscír, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: John Duxford nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Duxford, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Durd em 1532, em Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1557, em Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Duxford родился около 1510 г. в местности дуксфорд, камбриджешир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Durd в 1532 г. в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1557 г. в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Duxford nació aproximadamente 1510, en Duxford, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Lady Agnes Durd en 1532, en Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1557, en Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
